prompt: Dogfood and productionize agent-mailbox on GCP, run live e2e production testing, and correct the product thesis if self-hosting does not work.
plan: Verify market reality, patch Cloud Run runtime blockers, deploy to GCP Cloud Run from source, run production e2e against the live service, document production caveats, and update Agent Teacher evidence.
transcript: Verified market has real paid/hosted competitors: AgentMail, Nylas Agent Accounts, Dead Simple Email, and Atomic Mail Agentic. Inspected GCP auth: project agentmason-prod, region us-central1. Found and fixed Cloud Run blockers: CLI ignored PORT, and Docker image did not chown /app for first-run config/data writes. Added /health alias because exact /healthz on run.app returned a Google frontend HTML 404 while application routes reached the container. Added scripts/prod-e2e.mjs and docs/PRODUCTION-NOTES.md. Ran local gate: pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test:unit, pnpm test:integration, pnpm test:e2e, node scripts/verify-transcripts.mjs; all exited 0. Deployed Cloud Run service agent-mailbox-prod-test revision agent-mailbox-prod-test-00002-9bm. Ran AGENT_MAILBOX_BASE_URL=<cloud-run-url> AGENT_MAILBOX_API_KEY=<redacted> AGENT_MAILBOX_OPERATOR_TOKEN=<redacted> pnpm test:prod; it exited 0 and proved health, readyz, inbox create, allowed send, approval-required send, approve, blocklist 403, inbound HMAC webhook, and message retrieval. Confirmed /health and /readyz return 200 on Cloud Run; exact /healthz still returns Google frontend 404 on run.app. Ran pnpm build; tsup production build exited 0 and emitted ESM plus DTS artifacts under dist/.
result: The core Agent Mailbox concept works as a self-hosted Cloud Run proof: agents can receive structured inbound email, send allowed mail, queue risky outbound mail for approval, approve it, and block disallowed domains. pnpm build exited 0, local gates exited 0, Cloud Run source deploy built and rolled out revision agent-mailbox-prod-test-00002-9bm, and pnpm test:prod exited 0. It is not publish-ready as a durable production product because storage is ephemeral JSON-on-disk on Cloud Run and /healthz exact is unreliable on run.app; the defensible wedge is self-hosted agent email governance, not generic agent inboxes.
commands: web search: AgentMail, Nylas Agent Accounts, Dead Simple Email, Atomic Mail Agentic
gcloud auth list && gcloud config list
pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e && node scripts/verify-transcripts.mjs
gcloud run deploy agent-mailbox-prod-test --source . --project agentmason-prod --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --quiet --set-env-vars <redacted>
curl /healthz -> 404 from Google frontend on run.app
pnpm build -> exit 0, tsup ESM/DTS build success
preferences: Be honest if the concept does not work in production.
Separate real market competitors from product wedge inference.
Do not expose secrets in summaries or artifacts.
requiredChecks: market check for real paid competitors
Agent Teacher review rerun after productionization
